◎简　　介  

　　Equator takes you on a journey to some of the earth's most extreme environments to examine animal and plant life in six of the world's equatorial 'hot zones': The Rift Valley in Africa; the Amazon Basin; the peaks of the Andes; Borneo; Indo-Pacific and the Galapagos Islands.
introduction: Equator takes you on a journey to some of the earth's most extreme environments to examine animal and plant life in six of the world's equatorial 'hot zones': The Rift Valley in Africa; the Amazon Basin; the peaks of the Andes; Borneo; Indo-Pacific and the Galapagos Islands.
